phrases.en: Pam looks up the clinic's phone number online.
phrases.zh: 帕姆在网上查到诊所的电话号码。

phrases.en: She picks up her phone and dials the number carefully.
phrases.zh: 她拿起手机，小心地拨打这个号码。

phrases.en: A friendly receptionist answers and greets her warmly.
phrases.zh: 一位友善的前台接听了电话，热情地跟她打招呼。

phrases.en: Pam explains that she wants to make an appointment with the dentist.
phrases.zh: 帕姆说明她想和牙医预约一次看诊。

phrases.en: She gives her full name and spells her last name slowly.
phrases.zh: 她报上自己的全名，并慢慢地拼出姓氏。

phrases.en: She asks the receptionist about the available times next week.
phrases.zh: 她向前台询问下周有哪些空闲的时间。

phrases.en: The receptionist offers an early slot on Tuesday morning.
phrases.zh: 前台给她安排了周二上午的一个早场时间。

phrases.en: Pam happily chooses the nine o'clock slot.
phrases.zh: 帕姆高兴地选了九点的那个时间。

phrases.en: She repeats the date and time to confirm the appointment.
phrases.zh: 她重复一遍日期和时间，以确认这次预约。

phrases.en: She leaves her phone number for a friendly reminder.
phrases.zh: 她留下自己的电话号码，以便收到贴心的提醒。

phrases.en: Pam thanks the receptionist politely and hangs up.
phrases.zh: 帕姆礼貌地向前台道谢，然后挂断电话。

phrases.en: Finally, she writes down the appointment in her calendar.
phrases.zh: 最后，她把这次预约记在自己的日历上。
